page_content:
Formerly: PSYC671.

PSYC610 Historical Viewpoints and Current Theories in Psychology (3 Credits)

Origins of psychology in philosophy and the sciences; the development of psychology as a science in the nineteenth and twentieth centuries. A review of current theoretical perspectives and research in relation

to the enduring issues in psychology. The role of culture, science, and technology in the development of psychological ideas.

Credit Only Granted for. PSYC610 or PSYC688.
